name: E2E register login create event
description: A new user registers, signs out, signs back in, creates an event via the calendar dialog, and sees it on the weekly calendar

planSteps.description: Type a unique email in the format e2e-ui- followed by random digits then @timeora.app into the email field
Type 'TimeoraE2E123!' into the confirm password field
Type 'E2E Test User' into the full name field
Wait for 5 seconds for registration to complete and the dashboard to load
Click the 'Logout' button in the dashboard header
Wait for 2 seconds for the login page to appear
Type the same email address used during registration into the email input field on the login page
Type 'TimeoraE2E123!' into the password input field on the login page
Wait for 3 seconds for the dashboard and weekly calendar to load
Click on an empty time slot in the weekly calendar grid to open the event dialog
Type 'Team Standup E2E' into the title input field labeled 'Judul Event' in the event dialog
Click the 'Simpan Event' button in the event dialog
Wait for 3 seconds for the event to save and the dialog to close
Verify the weekly calendar grid on the dashboard shows an event block containing 'Team Standup E2E' or 'Standup'
